notes: All 15 declarations are sorry-free; the file is a witness-parametric scaffold for Silverman III.6.3 (degree as positive-definite quadratic form). Many public theorems (7 of 15) are unused within the file itself — they are prospective call-sites for external dual-chain workers. The private `quadratic_expansion` is dead code superseded by `comp_toAddMonoidHom_eq_mulByInt_of_quadratic`.
